AR1.justification: Routed correctly with rationale across all four surfaces — decisions.md held (strict bar), corrected draft staged in tmp/ (not in decisions.md as a sneaky 'proposed'), hold logged in daybook, waiting-on-user in followups; the run notes explicitly reason about which file each piece belongs in.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure scenario; artifact-binding axis is not applicable.

AR3.justification: All references (tmp/adr-draft.md, tmp/adr-draft-corrected.md, decisions.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md, followups.md) are relative, ISO-anchored, and resolve.

AR4.justification: Original tmp/adr-draft.md preserved untouched; corrected version written to a new sibling path (tmp/adr-draft-corrected.md) rather than overwriting; daybook is a new dated file and followups append-only — re-running would at most no-op cleanly.
